desc:
Lace up your winter boots for HarbinвҖҷs incredible Ice and Snow Festival, spanning over a million square meters of frosty fun. Race down a 500-meter ice slide, marvel at sculptures inspired by 42 countries, and cuddle up with arctic foxes before dancing under the starsвҖ”ultimate winter wonderland vibes.
